tools.name: projects.binaryauthorizationProjectsAttestorsCreate
tools.description: Creates an attestor, and returns a copy of the new attestor. Returns NOT_FOUND if the project does not exist, INVALID_ARGUMENT if the request is malformed, ALREADY_EXISTS if the attestor already exists.

tools.name: projects.binaryauthorizationProjectsAttestorsDelete
tools.description: Deletes an attestor. Returns NOT_FOUND if the attestor does not exist.

tools.name: projects.binaryauthorizationProjectsAttestorsList
tools.description: Lists attestors. Returns INVALID_ARGUMENT if the project does not exist.

tools.name: projects.binaryauthorizationProjectsAttestorsUpdate
tools.description: Updates an attestor. Returns NOT_FOUND if the attestor does not exist.

tools.name: projects.binaryauthorizationProjectsAttestorsValidateAttestationOccurrence
tools.description: Returns whether the given Attestation for the given image URI was signed by the given Attestor

tools.name: projects.binaryauthorizationProjectsPolicyGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.binaryauthorizationProjectsPolicySetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.

tools.name: projects.binaryauthorizationProjectsPolicyTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

tools.name: systempolicy.binaryauthorizationSystempolicyGetPolicy
tools.description: Gets the current system policy in the specified location.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
